prompt: Please based on the real photos of two adults I uploaded, generate a 'Couple Seaside Travel Film-style Snapshot Album Collage'. Strictly preserve the real identity characteristics of both people. Both the woman and the man must look like themselves in the uploaded photos, including face shape, facial feature proportions, eye structure, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, age, hairline, hairstyle characteristics, and overall temperament. The woman has a B-cup chest. Do not turn them into Caucasian faces, avoid influencer-style aesthetics, do not over-beautify, and do not replace them with strangers. Ultimately, all small photos must feature the same couple, captured as if by mobile phones, point-and-shoot cameras, or friends across various travel scenes. Format: A 4x4 collage with 16 small photos. Narrow black dividers between photos on a black background, with large black margins at the top and bottom, resembling a memory dump from a phone album, Instagram, or Xiaohongshu. Avoid polished professional layouts or commercial posters. Core Visual Style: Nostalgic film + old iPhone snapshot + couple's travel album. Include slight film grain, shadow noise, slight out-of-focus, motion blur, compression, occasional overexposure/backlighting, unstable lighting, and imperfect composition. Warm tones, natural skin, faded greens/blues, and grayish blacks, resembling phone vacation photos from 2016–2021. Not high-def, clean, or over-sharpened. Film Filter: Slight Kodak/Fuji disposable camera style. Light grain, warm yellow highlights, soft glows, and light night noise. Should look like real old photos rather than heavy modern templates. Relationship: A close, natural couple with life-like interactions: holding hands, selfies, eye contact, hugging, leaning on shoulders, kissing cheeks, eating, and walking together. Intimate but not erotic or vulgar. Travel Scene: Summer seaside city vacation with Mediterranean, Greek island, or Italian coastal vibes. Scenes include beaches, hotel mirrors, sunsets, restaurants, balconies, docks, and night cityscapes. These should feel like life fragments rather than tourist check-ins. 16 Grid Contents: 1. Beach selfie, close-up, strong sunlight, slightly overexposed. 2. Woman sitting alone in a cafe, hair windblown, friend's perspective snapshot. 3. Man walking away on a white town street, evening stroll feel. 4. Mirror selfie in a hotel bathroom, dim light, some noise. 5. Woman smiling back on a beach, summer outfit, waves in background. 6. Extreme close-up selfie, blurry, woman eyes closed, man near her cheek. 7. Woman's profile at sunset looking at the sea, grain and low contrast. 8. Man sitting by the pier or cafe looking relaxed at the camera. 9. Night walk hand-in-hand, motion blur, warm lighting. 10. Man sitting by the pool/sea, half-body shot, relaxed expression. 11. Selfie together, hair messy, slightly out of focus but high emotion. 12. Man taking a photo of the woman, travel documentary style. 13. Laughing loudly in a close-up selfie, accidental shot feel. 14. Man eating street food, natural and simple hand movements. 15. Woman on a balcony at night looking back, city light background, night noise. 16. Beach selfie, kissing cheek, last-day commemorative photo. Consistency Requirements: Maintain identical looks for the couple in every grid across all changes in clothes and light. No facial drift or distortion in side views or night shots. Hand Stability: Avoid fingers near the face. No complex gestures or hair-grabbing to prevent AI deformation. Hands should be naturally placed. Expression and Poses: Variety is key: selfies, profile shots, back views, eating, and walking. Avoid constant smiling at the camera. Quality: Real old iPhone album feel with low resolution, grain, compression, and imperfect composition. Restrictions: No deformed fingers, extra limbs, weird text, or watermarks. No nudity or minor-looking subjects. Avoid 'AI plastic' faces. Final Output: A 4x4 couple travel album collage, 1:1 ratio, black background, nostalgic film/old iPhone style, showcasing intimate, relaxed, and authentic summer vacation memories.
